title: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
intro: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Smoky Concepts website and the purchase of any products offered through it. By visiting our website or placing an order, you agree to be bound by these Terms in full.
Please read them carefully before using our website or making a purchase. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not use our website or services.

sectionsList.title: Smoky Concepts is operated by:
list: Business / Legal Name: House of Khanos
Brand Name: Smoky Concepts
Registered Address: Sundukyan 7/81,Yerevan, Republic of Armenia
Email: smokyconcepts@gmail.com

sectionsList.title: 1. Eligibility
paragraphs: By using our website or placing an order, you confirm that:
list: You have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement in your country of residence.
You are not purchasing products for resale without our prior written consent.
We reserve the right to refuse orders, cancel accounts, or restrict access if we have reason to believe these conditions are not met.

sectionsList.title: 2. Products
paragraphs: Smoky Concepts offers premium and semi-premium accessories and handcrafted goods. Our products may include, but are not limited to, items made from leather, gold, silver, wood, metal, carbon fiber, PETG, and other high-grade materials.
list: Product images, descriptions, and material details are provided as accurately as possible. However, slight variations in color, texture, finish, or dimension may occur due to the handcrafted and artisanal nature of our products.
We reserve the right to modify, discontinue, or limit the availability of any product at any time without prior notice.
All products are subject to availability. If an item becomes unavailable after your order is placed, we will contact you promptly to offer an alternative or a full refund.

sectionsList.title: 3. Custom and Personalized Orders
paragraphs: Many of our products are made to order or can be customized upon request. For custom orders:
list: All customization details must be submitted accurately at the time of ordering. We are not responsible for errors resulting from inaccurate information provided by the customer.
Custom and personalized items are non-refundable and non-exchangeable unless they arrive damaged, defective, or materially different from what was agreed.
Custom orders may require additional production time. Estimated timelines will be communicated at the time of order confirmation.
Once a custom order enters production, cancellations may not be possible. Please contact us immediately if you need to make changes.

sectionsList.title: 4. Pricing and Payment
list: All prices are listed on our website and are subject to change without prior notice.
Prices are displayed in AMD / USD / EUR / RUB, and additional taxes, customs duties, or import fees may apply depending on your location. These are the responsibility of the customer.

We accept payments via major debit and credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, and Idram. Cash on Delivery (COD) is also available for orders within Armenia only. All online transactions are processed securely through our payment partners.
We reserve the right to cancel any order if payment cannot be verified or if fraud is suspected.

sectionsList.title: 5. Orders and Order Confirmation
list: Placing an order constitutes an offer to purchase. A payment receipt from our payment provider confirms your transaction only. Your order is not confirmed until you receive a separate order confirmation email from Smoky Concepts.
We reserve the right to decline or cancel any order at our discretion, including if a product is out of stock, if there is a pricing error, or if we are unable to verify the order.
If your order is cancelled by us, you will receive a full refund of any amount paid.

sectionsList.title: 6. Shipping and Delivery
list: We currently ship to selected destinations. Available shipping regions are listed on our website and may expand over time.
Delivery timeframes are estimates and not guarantees. We are not liable for delays caused by shipping carriers, customs clearance, or circumstances beyond our control.
Risk of loss or damage passes to the customer upon handover to the shipping carrier. We strongly recommend inspecting your order upon receipt and reporting any damage or issues immediately.
Customers are responsible for any customs duties, import taxes, or local fees associated with international deliveries.

sectionsList.title: 7. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content on the Smoky Concepts website — including but not limited to product images, designs, logos, brand name, text, graphics, and the overall presentation — is the intellectual property of Smoky Concepts or its licensors.
You may not reproduce, copy, distribute, publish, modify, or use any content from this website for commercial purposes without our prior written consent.

sectionsList.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:
list: Smoky Concepts shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of our website or products.
Our total liability to you shall not exceed the amount you paid for the specific order giving rise to the claim.
We strive to keep our website running smoothly, but we cannot guarantee that it will always be error-free or uninterrupted.

sectionsList.title: 9. Prohibited Use
paragraphs: You agree not to use our website to:
list: Violate any applicable law or regulation.
Submit false, fraudulent, or misleading information.
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems.
Engage in any conduct that could harm, disrupt, or interfere with the website or its users.
Purchase products for the purpose of resale without written authorization.

sectionsList.title: 10. Third-Party Links
paragraphs: Our website may contain links to third-party websites or platforms. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or accuracy of any third-party site. Links do not constitute an endorsement.

sectionsList.title: 11. Governing Law and Disputes
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Armenia. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of our website shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of the Republic of Armenia.
Customers located in the European Union or other jurisdictions retain any statutory rights afforded to them under applicable local consumer protection law.

sectionsList.title: 12. Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. Updated Terms will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date. Continued use of the website following any update constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
